name: Easy Overnight Tuna Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can Solid white tuna -- water pack and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart casserole, combine all ingredients except margarine and bread crumbs. Cover and refrigerate 12 hours or overnight.
2. In a small mixing bowl, microwave margarine at HIGH for 45 seconds to 1 minute until melted. Add bread crumbs. Toss to coat. Set aside.
3. Microwave the casserole at HIGH, covered, for 12 to 15 minutes, or until the mixture is hot, stirring 3 times.
4. Sprinkle with bread crumb topping. Microwave uncovered for 2 minutes or until hot.
5. Bake in the oven at 350°F (175°C) uncovered for 55 minutes to 1 hour and 10 minutes, or until hot and bubbly.
